title: Macros, concurrency, and stabilization
summary: v0.3 delivers compiler mods, export FFI and dynamic types, runtime phase B GC work, corelib tiering, tooling/packageKind hardening, CI verification, `beskid lsp` with VS Code cli-latest bootstrap, and extension inventory docs.
theme: FFI/export, runtime GC, compiler mods, corelib tiering, LSP, stabilization

cutoff.rationale: Starts at v0.2 tip (2026-05-22); core v0.3 macro/runtime/ffi/tooling tracks land 2026-05-23; FFI/CI/spec hardening and CLI LSP continue through 2026-05-25 superrepo HEAD (aaddd32).
